description: The Acme Corp website is suffering from poor performance scores because static assets are not being cached by browsers. Your task is to enable and configure browser caching for the 'acmecorp.test' virtual server using Virtualmin. Ensure the Apache 'expires' module is enabled globally and set a default expiration policy of 1 month for the 'acmecorp.test' virtual server. Verify the configuration by checking the HTTP headers of the test file at http://acmecorp.test/cache_test.css.
